title: Chicken Wire Mesh Roll with 50 Pcs Fixed Straps, Heavy Duty Garden Plastic Fencing Net, Durable Rust-Proof Poultry Breeding Fence & Temporary Yard (40cm x 3m (8mm holes))
features: 【50 Cable Ties Included】1-pack fastener kit (50 cable ties included). Cut-to-size mesh instantly secures with heavy-duty ties. Pre-attached cable ties enable quick installation and reconfiguration – no technical skills required. Create custom sizes in minutes for temporary or permanent setups.

【Lightweight & Durable】Crafted from premium PE plastic, this mesh combines lightweight flexibility with exceptional durability. Soft yet sturdy texture allows easy trimming with household scissors. Its rust-proof, weather-resistant design ensures long-lasting performance for indoor and outdoor use, perfect for gardens, balconies, and poultry setups.

【Size】40 cm wide x 3 m long, 8 mm hexagonal holes. 8 mm hexagonal holes balance visibility and security while maintaining airflow. The 40cm roll offers ideal handling size for vertical/horizontal applications. Expand coverage by connecting multiple rolls with integrated fastening points.

【Multi-Functional Protection】Versatile hexagonal mesh safeguards gardens from pests, secures poultry enclosures, prevents balcony pet accidents, and acts as a bird-proof barrier. Doubles as gutter guards or pond netting, adapting seamlessly to diverse household and agricultural needs.
【Safe Design】Non-toxic material ensures pet/plant safety. Rounded edges and flexible structure prevent injuries during handling.
description: Product Description Chicken Wire Mesh Roll with 50 Pcs Fixed Straps Transform any space with ease! This chicken wire mesh roll is easy to cut and shape, adapting to your unique needs. Whether you’re creating a sturdy garden fence, a safe balcony railing, or a protective wrap for tree trunks, this mesh offers unmatched versatility for homeowners and DIY enthusiasts. 50 Cable Ties Included 1-pack fastener kit with 50 pre-attached heavy-duty cable ties for quick, tool-free installation and customizable sizing 8 mm hexagonal holes 40 cm x 12 m roll with 8 mm hexagonal holes for balanced visibility, security, and airflow, offering versatile vertical/horizontal handling DIY PE plastic mesh Lightweight yet durable premium PE plastic mesh with soft, cuttable texture for easy trimming using household scissors, featuring rust-proof and weather-resistant design for versatile long-term indoor/outdoor applications in gardens, balconies, and poultry environments.
